positive.title: Perfect steak
positive.transcript: Take ribeye steak salt pepper olive oil butter garlic and thyme. Season the steak. Sear it in a hot pan. Add butter garlic and thyme. Baste for two minutes. Rest before slicing.

positive.title: Vanilla cake
positive.transcript: Use flour sugar eggs milk butter vanilla and baking powder. Preheat the oven. Mix dry ingredients. Add eggs milk butter and vanilla. Whisk smooth. Bake until golden.

positive.title: Chicken curry
positive.transcript: We are using chicken onion garlic ginger tomato yogurt cumin coriander turmeric and curry powder. Fry the onion. Add garlic and ginger. Add chicken and brown it. Stir in tomato yogurt and spices. Simmer until tender.

positive.title: Lemon salmon
positive.transcript: You need salmon salt pepper lemon olive oil and parsley. Season the salmon. Heat oil in a pan. Sear the fish skin side down. Add lemon. Serve with parsley.

positive.title: Easy beef tacos
positive.transcript: For these tacos use ground beef onion chili powder cumin salt tortillas cilantro and lime. Brown the beef in a pan. Add onion and spices. Warm the tortillas. Fill each tortilla with beef. Serve with cilantro and lime.

positive.title: Chicken broccoli stir fry
positive.transcript: Use chicken broccoli garlic ginger soy sauce sesame oil and rice. Slice the chicken. Heat sesame oil in the pan. Add chicken and cook until browned. Add broccoli garlic and ginger. Stir in soy sauce. Serve over rice.

positive.title: Tomato soup
positive.transcript: You need tomato onion garlic broth cream basil salt and pepper. Roast the tomatoes. Cook onion and garlic in a pot. Add broth and simmer. Blend until smooth. Stir in cream and basil.

positive.title: Simple bread
positive.transcript: Use flour yeast salt water and olive oil. Mix flour yeast and salt. Pour in water and oil. Knead until smooth. Let the dough rise. Bake the bread until golden. Cool before slicing.

negative.title: Steakhouse review
negative.transcript: We visit a steakhouse and review steak fries dessert and service. Subscribe for more restaurant reviews.

negative.title: Eating only cake challenge
negative.transcript: Today I eat cake chocolate milk and cookies for twenty four hours and rate them. This is a funny challenge not a recipe.

negative.title: Grocery haul
negative.transcript: I bought chicken rice pasta butter and garlic at the store. Comment below if you like grocery videos.
